headline: Manuel Ugarte
body: 🚨 Man Utd midfield recruitment plans unaffected by Manuel Ugarte injury. Mateus Fernandes immediate priority + others also being considered. Might impact MUFC signing left-sided forward though - raises likelihood of Marcus Rashford staying TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7403715… Link The Transfer DealSheet: Latest on Man Utd, Arsenal, Liverpool, Real Madrid and more This is the latest across the game's biggest clubs in the 2026 summer transfer window nytimes.com
